concerns.text: Dataset URLs point to community HuggingFace uploads (chathuranga-jayanath/defects4j-context-5-len-10000-prompt-3, echodrift/adapt_defects4j) rather than the canonical Defects4J v2.0 distribution. These parquet files may not contain the complete test suite infrastructure required to execute patches and determine correctness (FR-003). Verify these specific HuggingFace versions include executable test suites, or switch to the official Defects4J repository as the primary source.

Phase 0 states 'Confirm Defects4J contains buggy files, test suites, and optional reference text' but does not specify how to verify the test suite is executable. The correctness label (FR-003) requires running tests against generated patches. If the HuggingFace parquet files only contain code metadata without test execution infrastructure, the core analysis cannot proceed. Add explicit verification step for test suite executability.
